hero.title: Meeting Scheduler
hero.description: Organize meeting schedules, participants, response labels, and agendas in one private workspace.

differences.title: Meeting planning without scattered notes
differences.description: Keep the chosen schedule and its supporting details together.

items.title: Schedule clearly
items.description: Record the date, times, timezone, type, location, and status.

items.title: Track people
items.description: Keep participant roles and user-entered response labels with the meeting.

items.title: Prepare the agenda
items.description: Order agenda topics with duration and discussion status.

feel.title: A calm record before the meeting starts
feel.description: Move from schedule to participants to agenda without leaving the meeting record.

items.title: Easy to review
items.description: Search and filter upcoming, past, and status-based records.

items.title: Focused details
items.description: Open one meeting to manage its people and topics.

items.title: Clear boundaries
items.description: No email delivery, calendar sync, conferencing, or external availability claims.

audiences.title: Who uses Meeting Scheduler
audiences.description: Useful for people who need a simple general-purpose scheduling record.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Plan personal or work meetings in a private workspace.

items.title: Coordinators
items.description: Keep participant and agenda details organized.

items.title: Project owners
items.description: Review scheduled, completed, cancelled, and draft meetings.

resourceSection.title: Meeting planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the details needed to prepare and revisit a meeting.

items.title: Meetings
items.description: Create, edit, search, filter, review, and delete schedules.

items.title: Participants
items.description: Record names, optional email, roles, response labels, and notes.

items.title: Agenda
items.description: Order discussion items with durations and progress labels.

groupedSection.title: One protected planning workflow
groupedSection.description: Each nested record stays inside an owner-scoped meeting.

items.name: When and where
items.description: Store date, start, end, timezone, type, and location.

items.name: Lifecycle
items.description: Use draft, scheduled, completed, or cancelled status.

items.name: Discussion order
items.description: Keep agenda items in a useful sequence.

technicalSection.title: Built for private meeting records
technicalSection.description: Meeting Scheduler follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Authenticated owner-scoped meetings and nested records.
Generated API contracts and shared form, feedback, and confirmation patterns.
No external calendar, email, conferencing, availability, reminder, AI, or third-party integration.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize a meeting?
finalCta.description: Open Meetings and create the first schedule.
